title: Cinnamon
description: A lightweight modpack, with everything you'll ever need
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/596010cad722e9f955acfd247ad8f563ce59d2d8_0.webp)

# Cinnamon - Lightweight, smooth, and useful
Tired of modpacks with over 100 mods? that was Overly Fancy for you. But introducing something a lot smoother, better, and customisable.

**Cinnamon** is a modpack made to succeed Overly Fancy, a forked modpack. It was **discontinued** not only because of being really heavy to run, but also **terribly** optimized and lack of updates ~~(because there was literally over 100 mods)~~

Cinnamon is not meant to be like the previous modpack, it instead focuses on simplicity, being lightweight (so my computer can run it), and useful. Afterall, who needs mods when resourcepacks can do anything! 

**Most updates are mod-update based, which means it only updates the mod and adds *almost* nothing new.**

**Mod List:**
Available at Versions Tab, along with changelogs.

~~### IMPORTANT
Starting 1.21.5, Cinnamon will only be optimization based. This means that versions below 1.21.4 will be counted as outdated and the new versions will be very bare bones. The mod count will be reduced from 30 to 12-15s. But do not worry! New modpacks will be created focusing on Visual, Utilites, and Optimization! (Cinnamon is the optimization one). So make sure to be looking forward to them.
The roadmap is unconfirmed but the names have been selected! Look forward to the other modpacks at the release of 1.22~~
